ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient group (e.g., Controls, Patients with Seizures) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patient group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient group the patient belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient was added to the study */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patient's information */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has given consent for data usage */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES patient_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seizure_data" (
  "seizure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seizure record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient experiencing seizures */,
  "number_of_seizures" INTEGER /* Number of seizures recorded for this patient */,
  "linear_score" INTEGER /* Linear score indicating the severity of seizures */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the seizure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the seizure record */,
  "seizure_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the seizure */,
  "seizure_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the seizure */,
  "seizure_type" TEXT /* Type of seizure (e.g., focal, generalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seizure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seizure_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the results belong to */,
  "plasma_ferritin" REAL /* Plasma ferritin level in mg/mL */,
  "iron_deficiency" TEXT /* Indicates if the patient has iron deficiency (Yes/No) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the lab result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the lab result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the lab test was performed */,
  "lab_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "test_result_units" TEXT /* Units of the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient group statistics pertain to */,
  "number_of_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients in the group */,
  "median_ferritin" TEXT /* Median plasma ferritin level with interquartile range */,
  "percentage_with_deficiency" TEXT /* Percentage of patients with iron deficiency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics record */,
  "mean_ferritin" REAL /* Mean plasma ferritin level */,
  "standard_deviation_ferritin" REAL /* Standard deviation of plasma ferritin levels */,
  "min_ferritin" REAL /* Minimum plasma ferritin level */,
  "max_ferritin" REAL /* Maximum plasma ferritin level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_statistics_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES patient_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Researcher's role in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher's information */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Researcher's affiliation (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Researcher's area of expertise */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient visiting */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the visit record */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., completed, scheduled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view patient data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit patient data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission record */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can delete patient data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was changed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the audit record was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
